arts.ttl: Premier League legends slam Real Madrid’s ‘insulting’ Trent Alexander-Arnold bid
arts.sum: Real Madrid’s ongoing pursuit of Trent Alexander-Arnold is affecting his performance at Liverpool. Los Blancos are working to secure a free transfer for the England international in 2025, with his Reds contract running out in June, despite a fresh offer from the club. arts.ttl: Real Madrid have willing replacement for Carlo Ancelotti in place for 2025 or 2026
arts.sum: As recently as two months ago, it looked as if Real Madrid might be searching for a new manager during the season for the first time in six years. However Carlo Ancelotti has turned things around, and has Los Blancos top of the table – but that has not altered their plans for his position.
